# BusinessFlow — Notion brain snapshot

> Durable backup/mirror of the Notion brief ([source](https://www.notion.so/a72c8f26a29a40fd9e23febebc73e078)).
> Canonical working brain is [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md). Regenerate via the
> **Snapshot Notion brain** GitHub Action (scheduled + manual).

> BusinessFlow Studio — SaaS website builder for small businesses. Active project. The repo's own `CLAUDE.md` is the source of truth; this page is the quick brief.


# Facts

- **Repo:** kingithegreat/bussnessbuilder (app at repo root, no subfolder)
- **Live URL:** [https://businessflow-722923667291.us-central1.run.app](https://businessflow-722923667291.us-central1.run.app/)
- **Stack:** Angular 21 SSR (standalone components, signals, `@`-syntax) + Express server, Tailwind v4 + Angular Material 21, Firebase Auth + Firestore + Storage, Google Gemini AI, Stripe subscriptions. Deployed on Google Cloud Run.
- **Per-user data:** Firestore at `/users/{uid}/businessData/main` (+ sub-docs).

# Commands


```bash
npm install                 # needs .npmrc legacy-peer-deps (@angular/fire@20 vs Angular 21)
npm run dev                 # dev server, port 3000
npm run build               # production SSR build
npm run lint                # ESLint
npm test -- --watch=false   # Vitest
```


# Core rules

- ALL site-customization features (branding, page/form builder, sections, layouts, colours, fonts) are on EVERY tier. Only AI tools, enquiry/service limits, and admin extras are tier-gated.
- firebase-admin, Stripe, nodemailer, and @google/genai MUST stay lazy-loaded in `server.ts` (CommonJS breaks Angular's ESM build).
- Firestore DocumentData uses bracket notation (`data['field']`).

# Tiers

- **Free:** template-only AI, 3 services, 10 enquiries
- **Pro ($14/mo):** real AI, unlimited services/enquiries, export/import
- **Business ($22/mo):** priority AI, custom domain, analytics, remove branding

# Current state (2026-06-27)

- Production-readiness pass done (rate limiting, caching, CI/CD scaffold, legal).
- Added a unit-test suite (tier gating, presets, pipe) — 22 tests — and fixed CI: `ci.yml` lints/tests/builds on PRs; `deploy.yml` build-and-check was pointing at a non-existent `bussnessbuilder/` subfolder and failing on every push to main — corrected.
- Working branch for AI sessions: `claude/whats-next-*`.
- **Cleanup (2026-06-27):** A separate session spun up branch `claude/lucid-gauss-mj0y7a` + **PR #1** from the *original scaffold* ("fix this app and deploy on firebase"), proposing a **static Firebase Hosting SPA**. It predated all the SSR / Firebase / Stripe / Cloud Run work, so it was stale and would have reverted production (it conflicted with `main`). **Action taken: PR #1 closed, stale branch deleted, ****`main`**** untouched.** The "deploy on Firebase" goal is already satisfied — the app runs on Cloud Run using Firebase Auth/Firestore/Storage (live URL above), not static Hosting.

# Known issues / next up

- Custom domains: text field + DNS instructions only, no automated mapping yet
- Stripe still in test mode — switch keys before real payments
- GitHub Actions WIF secrets not yet configured for auto-deploy
- Branch `claude/whats-next-dq0gdx` (test+CI, dev config, perf, guard tests) is pushed but NOT merged/deployed — live site doesn't have it yet. **⚠️ STALE — do NOT merge as-is:** it forked from `d5b7334` (before the growth feature `c47be18` landed on main) and **deletes** `admin-growth.component.ts` + `GROWTH_ENGINE.md`, so merging would revert the Growth engine. It still has good non-conflicting work (tests, the `deploy.yml` subfolder fix, perf batching) — **rebase onto current ****`main`**** and drop the growth deletions before merging.**
- **Shared "brain" set up (2026-06-27) — PR #2 (open):** so context/tasks never need re-explaining and every AI stays current.
  - **Canonical brain = the repo.** `CLAUDE.md` is the source of truth; git history = automatic, revertable backup. This Notion brief is the human mirror + 2nd backup (Notion keeps page history). Same facts live in both → a bad edit in one is recoverable from the other.
  - **All AIs read one source:** added `AGENTS.md` (Codex et al.) + `.github/copilot-instructions.md` (Copilot) that point at `CLAUDE.md` — one brain, not three drifting copies.
  - **Protocol baked into ****`CLAUDE.md`****:** "Before you start" (sync to current `origin/main`, confirm task isn't already done, `claude/whats-next-*` branches, verify a branch isn't stale before merging) + "sync the brain at session end."
- **CI fix — PR #3 (open):** `deploy.yml` `build-and-check` pointed at a non-existent `bussnessbuilder/` subfolder (app is at repo root), so CI failed on every push to `main`. Corrected paths.

# Resolved

- Admin `/users` + `/metrics` O(N) Firestore reads → now batched via `getAllDocs` (parallel `getAll`), response shape unchanged (commit c2f2747)
- Demo button → was already removed from the UI; deleted orphaned `loadDemo`/`loadDemoData` dead code (commit b5477b1)
- Test suite expanded 1 → 41 across 6 files (tier gating, presets, pipe, DataService lead-scoring/import-export, route guards)
